features.title: VAPI_API_KEY env
features.description: Store Vapi API key in .env.local as VAPI_API_KEY

features.title: Assistant create API
features.description: POST /api/vapi/assistant creates a new Vapi assistant

features.title: Assistant update
features.acceptance: Updated fields reflect in Vapi dashboard

features.title: Assistant delete
features.acceptance: Assistant no longer appears in list

features.title: Voice model selection
features.description: Assistant config accepts model field (gpt-4o, claude-3-5-sonnet)
features.acceptance: Model field persists and is used in calls

features.description: Set voice.provider=elevenlabs and voice.voiceId in assistant config

features.title: Voice provider Deepgram
features.acceptance: STT uses Deepgram for word-level transcription

features.title: First message config
features.description: Assistant firstMessage field sets opening greeting
features.acceptance: Agent speaks firstMessage when call connects

features.title: System prompt config
features.description: Assistant model.systemPrompt field sets agent persona

features.title: End call phrases
features.description: assistant.endCallPhrases array triggers call end on phrase match

features.title: End call function
features.description: Assistant can call endCall function tool to terminate call

features.title: LLM temperature
features.acceptance: Temperature value passed to LLM provider

features.title: Background denoising
features.acceptance: Noise reduction active on inbound audio

features.title: Model fallback chain
features.acceptance: Falls back to secondary LLM on primary failure

features.description: ElevenLabs stability param 0-1 in voice config

features.acceptance: Voice cloning similarity matches configured value

features.title: Voice speed setting
features.description: ElevenLabs speed param controls speaking rate

features.title: Webhook URL config
features.acceptance: Vapi sends events to correct endpoint

features.acceptance: Tools callable by LLM during call

features.description: Each tool has async=false timeout config

features.description: Assign phone number to assistant via Vapi dashboard
